overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a sunny coastal beach with palm trees, power lines, and distant mountains. The character moves steadily along the sandy shore passing a large transmission tower and utility poles before reaching an open beach area with expansive water views.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach path with vegetation and power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach path with bushes and palm trees on the left and ocean on the right

entered.detail: dry sandy terrain with scattered small rocks and patches of vegetation
tall palm trees with green fronds lining the left side of the beach
overhead electrical wires running parallel to the beach path
large metal lattice electricity pylon visible in the distance
calm blue ocean water with gentle waves lapping the shore
dry desert scrub and low bushes on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny coastal beach path with dry vegetation and palm trees on the left and calm ocean water on the right. Overhead power lines run parallel to the path, and a large transmission tower is visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area with transmission tower and rocky shoreline

events.description: character passes the large metal transmission tower on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach path, passing the transmission tower and approaching the rocky shoreline area

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks along the water's edge
wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large transmission tower on the left as the vegetation thins out. The shoreline becomes rockier with boulders visible along the water's edge, and a wooden utility pole appears ahead along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with panoramic mountain and water views

events.description: view opens to reveal expansive mountain range across the water as character moves past utility pole

agents.ego_description: walking across the open beach with expansive views of mountains across the water

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountains visible across the water in the distance
distant buildings and structures visible along the opposite shore

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a wide open beach area with panoramic views of a large mountain range across the water. The transmission tower and utility pole are now behind, and the distant shoreline with buildings becomes visible across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal path that gradually opens into a panoramic beach vista. It begins with the character walking between dry vegetation and palm trees, with overhead power lines running parallel to the calm ocean water. As the character advances, the scene shifts past a large transmission tower while the greenery thins and the shoreline becomes rockier with scattered boulders. The path then expands into a wide open beach area, leaving the utility poles behind to reveal an expansive view of a distant mountain range across the water. Finally, the perspective widens to encompass the entire bay, bringing a far-off shoreline dotted with buildings into view.
